content: 2025 dec ki internal sales kitni ha
The total internal sales for 2025 is approximately 12.25 crores. This figure represents the cumulative sum of all internal sales for the year 2025, as per the available data.
waqas ki 2025 ki doctor planning batow

Waqas has a total of 24 doctors planned for December 2025, with each doctor having multiple scheduled visits across various health centers, resulting in a total of 288 scheduled visits for the month. This indicates a comprehensive planning approach by Waqas to cover a wide range of health centers and doctors throughout December 2025.
okay iske kitne visits complete hogay or kahan kahan pr hue

sql:
SELECT 
  dp."doctorId",
  d.name AS "Doctor Name",
  dp."healthCentreId",
  hc.name AS "Health Centre Name",
  dp.date,
  dp.status
FROM 
  doctor_plan dp
JOIN 
  doctors d ON dp."doctorId" = d.id
JOIN 
  healthcentres hc ON dp."healthCentreId" = hc.id
WHERE 
  dp.status = 'VISITED'
ORDER BY 
  dp.date;

content: okay iske planned or complete ki overall summary bna doo

Waqas ki doctor planning ki overall summary yeh hai ki 224 planned visits mein se 86 visits complete ho gaye hain, jo ki ek bahut acchi shuruaat hai. Isse pata chalta hai ki Waqas ne apni planning mein bahut mehnat ki hai aur ab tak kaam aage badh raha hai.
sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN dp.status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) AS planned,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN dp.status = 'VISITED' THEN 1 END) AS completed
FROM 
  doctor_plan dp
WHERE 
  dp.date >= '2025-01-01' AND dp.date < '2026-01-01';

content: Waqas ke planned visits ki details yeh hai: total 10 planned visits hain, jinmein se 10 visits complete ho gaye hain, aur sabhi visits ki status "VISITED" hai.
sql:
SELECT 
  "doctorId", 
  "healthCentreId", 
  "managerId", 
  "date", 
  "eventType", 
  "description", 
  "shift", 
  "latitude", 
  "longitude", 
  "inHealthCentre", 
  "distance_in_meters", 
  "visited_date", 
  "status", 
  "approval"
FROM 
  doctor_plan
WHERE 
  "managerId" IN (
    SELECT 
      id 
    FROM 
      managers 
    WHERE 
      name ILIKE '%Waqas%'
  );
